parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

nodes.name: Telegram — Send Brief
nodes.notes: One sendMessage per compiled item, in order (800ms apart so Telegram keeps sequence). Per-section bot tokens optional — fallback is the single TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.
